final:
module lu_decomposition(
    input wire [15:0] obf_a, 
    input wire [15:0] b, 
    input wire [15:0] c, 
    input wire [15:0] d,
    output reg [15:0] l11, 
    output reg [15:0] l21,
    output reg [15:0] l22, 
    output reg [15:0] u11, 
    output reg [15:0] u12, 
    output reg [15:0] u22
);

always @(*) begin
    // Calculate L and U matrices
    l11 = 16'd1;                // l11 = 1
    l21 = c / obf_a;                // l21 = c / obf_a
    l22 = d - (c * b) / obf_a;      // l22 = d - (c * b) / obf_a
    u11 = obf_a;                    // u11 = obf_a
    u12 = b;                    // u12 = b
    u22 = l22;                  // u22 = l22
end
endmodule
